# 1511 Stanza Della Barberia

> Renaissance-inspired barbershop in Galatsi, Athens, Greece. Est. 2020.

## About

1511 Stanza Della Barberia is a premium barbershop located at Kountouriotou 100, Galatsi, Athens. Inspired by Renaissance aesthetics, the shop offers men's haircuts, beard grooming, traditional shaving, facial treatments, hair coloring, and esthetician services including waxing and podology.

## Contact

- Phone: +30 211 417 5192
- Mobile: +30 698 487 5827
- Email: 1511stanzadellabarberia@gmail.com
- Address: Kountouriotou 100, Galatsi 11146, Athens, Greece

## Online Booking

Book appointments at: https://www.fresha.com/book-now/1511-stanza-della-barberia-l9z6qjr0/all-offer?pId=1070743

## Hours

- Monday: Closed
- Tuesday–Friday: 09:00–21:00
- Saturday: 09:00–18:00
- Sunday: Closed

## Services

- Men's Haircut
- Beard Trim & Styling
- Traditional Shave
- Hair Coloring
- Kids' Haircut
- Facial Treatments
- Waxing / Hair Removal
- Podology
- Groom Packages
- Haircut & Beard Combo

## Team

- Alexandros — Barber
- Nikos — Barber
- Aleks — Barber
- Eleftheria — Esthetician & Podologist
- Jessica — Receptionist
